overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rainy neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character traverses an elevated plaza with holographic billboards, descends covered stairs to street level, and moves through heavy traffic on a wet multi-lane road beneath an overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban plaza overlooking lower city levels with holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across elevated plaza with glass railings, overlooking lower city districts

entered.detail: large floating holographic display with pink neon text reading DREAM against dark sky
transparent safety barrier along elevated walkway edge
rain-slicked concrete surface reflecting neon lights
raised pedestrian platform with view to lower levels

segments.scene_description: The character walks across an elevated urban plaza at night during heavy rain. Large holographic billboards glow pink against the dark sky, while wet concrete surfaces reflect the neon lights. The area is sparsely populated with a few distant pedestrians visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway approaching stair descent to lower level

events.description: character approaches and begins descending covered stairway to street level

agents.ego_description: walking along upper promenade and approaching stairs, then beginning descent

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking in opposite direction along the walkway

entered.detail: concrete staircase leading down to street level with metal railings
solid concrete barrier along walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the elevated walkway, passing a pedestrian with an umbrella. The scene transitions toward a stairway entrance leading downward, with the large holographic billboard now visible in the background. The environment features concrete architecture mixed with neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered concrete stairwell with illuminated directional arrow markings

events.description: entering fully covered stairwell with artificial amber lighting and illuminated wall arrows
exiting stairwell tunnel to street level under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: descending covered concrete stairs toward street level, protected from rain

entered.detail: dark concrete walls with perforated metal panels emitting amber light
glowing directional arrows embedded in stairwell walls

segments.scene_description: The character descends through a covered concrete stairwell illuminated by amber directional arrows. The space is enclosed and sheltered from the rain, creating a stark contrast with the neon-lit exterior. The descent ends as the character approaches the tunnel exit to street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk under elevated highway with heavy traffic and neon building facades

events.description: character steps off sidewalk curb onto the active roadway

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk next to busy multi-lane road under overpass, passing pedestrians with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan with glowing accents driving past on wet road

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure spanning across the road
concrete divider separating sidewalk from traffic lanes
building front with large illuminated digital displays and cyan neon trim

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairwell, the character walks along a sidewalk beneath an elevated highway. Heavy traffic flows on the wet road beside the walkway, with futuristic vehicles passing by. Neon-lit building facades illuminate the scene with cyan and pink hues reflecting off rain-soaked surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: active multi-lane road under overpass with dense traffic flow

events.description: transitioning from sidewalk to walking within active traffic lanes

agents.ego_description: walking through heavy traffic on wet asphalt road, weaving between moving vehicles

notable_agents.action: blue SUV with underglow approaching and passing close to character
black sedan with bright headlights navigating through rain

entered.detail: wet black asphalt with reflective surface showing vehicle lights
glowing orange lines embedded in road surface

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto the active roadway and moves through dense traffic beneath the overpass. Vehicles including a blue SUV and black sedans navigate around the character on the wet asphalt. Glowing lane markings reflect off the rain-soaked road surface as the elevated highway recedes into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated, neon-lit urban plaza down into the dense, rain-soaked traffic of a futuristic street level. It begins with the character traversing a wet concrete plaza under the glow of massive pink holographic billboards and a heavy downpour. As the character passes a pedestrian with an umbrella, the scene shifts toward a covered concrete stairwell, transitioning from the open neon exterior into an enclosed space illuminated by amber directional arrows. The camera then follows the descent through the tunnel before emerging onto a sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, where cyan and pink building facades reflect off the rain-slicked ground. Finally, the character steps directly onto the active roadway, moving through a stream of futuristic vehicles and glowing lane markings as the overpass recedes into the background.
